name: Super Mario Bros.
description: Mainline 2D Mario platforming branch built around side-scrolling stages, power-ups, and Mushroom Kingdom adventures.

eras.title: Classic 2D Era

eras.title: New Super Mario Era
eras.description: Modern revival of traditional 2D Mario structure.

eras.title: Wonder Era
